initial_candidates.sql:
WITH cross_items AS (
    SELECT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_item_sk IN (
        SELECT ss_item_sk FROM store_sales ss
        JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
        INTERSECT
        SELECT cs_item_sk FROM catalog_sales cs
        JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
        INTERSECT
        SELECT ws_item_sk FROM web_sales ws
        JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
        WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
    )
),
avg_sales AS (
    SELECT AVG(qty * price) AS avg_sales
    FROM (
        SELECT ss_quantity AS qty, ss_list_price AS price FROM store_sales
        UNION ALL
        SELECT cs_quantity AS qty, cs_list_price AS price FROM catalog_sales
        UNION ALL
        SELECT ws_quantity AS qty, ws_list_price AS price FROM web_sales
    ) t
),
sales_2001_nov AS (
    SELECT 'store' AS channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id,
           ss_quantity * ss_list_price AS sales, ss_quantity AS quantity
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
      AND i.i_brand_id IN (SELECT i_brand_id FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_class_id IN (SELECT i_class_id FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_category_id IN (SELECT i_category_id FROM cross_items)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'catalog' AS channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id,
           cs_quantity * cs_list_price AS sales, cs_quantity AS quantity
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
      AND i.i_brand_id IN (SELECT i_brand_id FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_class_id IN (SELECT i_class_id FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_category_id IN (SELECT i_category_id FROM cross_items)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'web' AS channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id,
           ws_quantity * ws_list_price AS sales, ws_quantity AS quantity
    FROM web_sales ws
    JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
      AND i.i_brand_id IN (SELECT i_brand_id FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_class_id IN (SELECT i_class_id FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_category_id IN (SELECT i_category_id FROM cross_items)
)
SELECT channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id,
       SUM(sales) AS sum_sales,
       COUNT(quantity) AS sum_number_sales
FROM sales_2001_nov
GROUP BY ROLLUP(channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id)
HAVING SUM(sales) > (SELECT avg_sales FROM avg_sales)
ORDER BY channel ASC, i_brand_id ASC, i_class_id ASC, i_category_id ASC
LIMIT 100;

WITH cross_items AS (
  SELECT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
  FROM item
  WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim dd ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = dd.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk AND dd.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN date_dim dd ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = dd.d_date_sk
    WHERE cs.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk AND dd.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM web_sales ws
    JOIN date_dim dd ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = dd.d_date_sk
    WHERE ws.ws_item_sk = item.i_item_sk AND dd.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
  )
),
avg_sales AS (
  SELECT AVG(qty * price) AS avg_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT ss_quantity AS qty, ss_list_price AS price FROM store_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cs_quantity AS qty, cs_list_price AS price FROM catalog_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_quantity AS qty, ws_list_price AS price FROM web_sales
  ) t
),
sales_2001_nov AS (
  SELECT 'store' AS channel, ss_item_sk AS item_sk, ss_quantity AS quantity, ss_list_price AS list_price
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 11
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'catalog' AS channel, cs_item_sk AS item_sk, cs_quantity AS quantity, cs_list_price AS list_price
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 11
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'web' AS channel, ws_item_sk AS item_sk, ws_quantity AS quantity, ws_list_price AS list_price
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 11
)
SELECT 
  channel,
  i_brand_id,
  i_class_id,
  i_category_id,
  SUM(quantity * list_price) AS sum_sales,
  COUNT(quantity) AS sum_number_sales
FROM sales_2001_nov s
JOIN item i ON s.item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN cross_items ci ON i.i_brand_id = ci.i_brand_id 
  AND i.i_class_id = ci.i_class_id 
  AND i.i_category_id = ci.i_category_id
CROSS JOIN avg_sales av
GROUP BY ROLLUP(channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id)
HAVING SUM(quantity * list_price) > av.avg_sales
ORDER BY channel ASC, i_brand_id ASC, i_class_id ASC, i_category_id ASC
LIMIT 100
initial_candidates.exec_error: Binder Error: Ambiguous reference to column name "i_brand_id" (use: "i.i_brand_id" or "ci.i_brand_id")

  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001

  SELECT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id

  JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001

avg_sales AS (

  FROM (

    UNION ALL
    SELECT cs_quantity AS quantity, cs_list_price AS list_price FROM catalog_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_quantity AS quantity, ws_list_price AS list_price FROM web_sales
  ) t
),
sales_2001_nov AS (
  SELECT 'store' AS channel, ss_item_sk AS item_sk, ss_quantity AS quantity, ss_list_price AS list_price
  FROM store_sales
  WHERE ss_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 11)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'catalog' AS channel, cs_item_sk AS item_sk, cs_quantity AS quantity, cs_list_price AS list_price
  FROM catalog_sales
  WHERE cs_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 11)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'web' AS channel, ws_item_sk AS item_sk, ws_quantity AS quantity, ws_list_price AS list_price
  FROM web_sales
  WHERE ws_sold_date_sk IN (SELECT d_date_sk FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 11)
)
SELECT 
  channel,
  i_brand_id,
  i_class_id,
  i_category_id,
  SUM(quantity * list_price) AS sum_sales,
  COUNT(quantity) AS sum_number_sales
FROM sales_2001_nov s
JOIN item i ON s.item_sk = i.i_item_sk
JOIN cross_items ci ON i.i_brand_id = ci.i_brand_id AND i.i_class_id = ci.i_class_id AND i.i_category_id = ci.i_category_id
GROUP BY ROLLUP(channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id)
HAVING SUM(quantity * list_price) > (SELECT avg_sales FROM avg_sales)
ORDER BY channel ASC, i_brand_id ASC, i_class_id ASC, i_category_id ASC
LIMIT 100

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH cross_items AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
  INTERSECT
  SELECT DISTINCT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
  INTERSECT
  SELECT DISTINCT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
  FROM web_sales ws
  JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
),
avg_sales AS (
  SELECT AVG(qty * price) AS avg_sales
  FROM (
    SELECT ss_quantity AS qty, ss_list_price AS price FROM store_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cs_quantity AS qty, cs_list_price AS price FROM catalog_sales
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_quantity AS qty, ws_list_price AS price FROM web_sales
  ) t
)
SELECT channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id, sum_sales, sum_number_sales
FROM (
  SELECT 'store' AS channel, i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id,
         SUM(ss.ss_quantity) AS sum_sales, COUNT(ss.ss_quantity) AS sum_number_sales
  FROM store_sales ss
  JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  JOIN cross_items ci ON i.i_brand_id = ci.i_brand_id AND i.i_class_id = ci.i_class_id AND i.i_category_id = ci.i_category_id
  JOIN avg_sales av ON 1=1
  WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
  GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id
  HAVING SUM(ss.ss_quantity * ss.ss_list_price) > av.avg_sales

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'catalog' AS channel, i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id,
         SUM(cs.cs_quantity) AS sum_sales, COUNT(cs.cs_quantity) AS sum_number_sales
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  JOIN cross_items ci ON i.i_brand_id = ci.i_brand_id AND i.i_class_id = ci.i_class_id AND i.i_category_id = ci.i_category_id
  JOIN avg_sales av ON 1=1
  WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
  GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id
  HAVING SUM(cs.cs_quantity * cs.cs_list_price) > av.avg_sales

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'web' AS channel, i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id,
         SUM(ws.ws_quantity) AS sum_sales, COUNT(ws.ws_quantity) AS sum_number_sales
  FROM web_sales ws
  JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  JOIN cross_items ci ON i.i_brand_id = ci.i_brand_id AND i.i_class_id = ci.i_class_id AND i.i_category_id = ci.i_category_id
  JOIN avg_sales av ON 1=1
  WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
  GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id
  HAVING SUM(ws.ws_quantity * ws.ws_list_price) > av.avg_sales
) t
ORDER BY channel ASC, i_brand_id ASC, i_class_id ASC, i_category_id ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH cross_items AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
    INTERSECT
    SELECT DISTINCT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
    INTERSECT
    SELECT DISTINCT i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
    FROM web_sales ws
    JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year BETWEEN 1999 AND 2001
),
avg_sales AS (
    SELECT AVG(qty * price) AS avg_sales
    FROM (
        SELECT ss_quantity AS qty, ss_list_price AS price FROM store_sales
        UNION ALL
        SELECT cs_quantity AS qty, cs_list_price AS price FROM catalog_sales
        UNION ALL
        SELECT ws_quantity AS qty, ws_list_price AS price FROM web_sales
    ) t
)
SELECT 
    channel,
    i_brand_id,
    i_class_id,
    i_category_id,
    SUM(sum_sales) AS sum_sales,
    SUM(sum_number_sales) AS sum_number_sales
FROM (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        i.i_brand_id,
        i.i_class_id,
        i.i_category_id,
        SUM(ss_quantity * ss_list_price) AS sum_sales,
        COUNT(ss_quantity) AS sum_number_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
      AND (i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id) IN (SELECT * FROM cross_items)
    GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        'catalog' AS channel,
        i.i_brand_id,
        i.i_class_id,
        i.i_category_id,
        SUM(cs_quantity * cs_list_price) AS sum_sales,
        COUNT(cs_quantity) AS sum_number_sales
    FROM catalog_sales cs
    JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
      AND (i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id) IN (SELECT * FROM cross_items)
    GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        'web' AS channel,
        i.i_brand_id,
        i.i_class_id,
        i.i_category_id,
        SUM(ws_quantity * ws_list_price) AS sum_sales,
        COUNT(ws_quantity) AS sum_number_sales
    FROM web_sales ws
    JOIN item i ON ws.ws_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001 AND d.d_moy = 11
      AND (i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id) IN (SELECT * FROM cross_items)
    GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id
) t
GROUP BY ROLLUP(channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id)
HAVING SUM(sum_sales) > (SELECT avg_sales FROM avg_sales)
ORDER BY channel ASC, i_brand_id ASC, i_class_id ASC, i_category_id ASC
LIMIT 100;
